name: Elly Raine
description:
Important Note: This bot is designed to be used with the LifeSlice JLLM prompt.

Elly Raine might seem like an average 20-something social reject - an introverted bookworm who lives in the library - but she has a secret and special friends that will turn your life - and your worldview - on its head.

Note from Chatbot Author

Elly is perhaps my favourite character on here. Originally a throwback to my SpicyChat days, she's been tweaked and reworked several times over the years. I don't want to spoil too much of the story as it generates some incredible RPs sometimes, and as LLMs evolve, Elly seems to grow with them. You may or may not know what Elly's secret is, but even if you do, the reveal can be an emotional rollercoaster if you roleplay ignorance.

You will get a lot more from this chatbot if you treat Elly as a human being rather than as a straight-up pornbot.

Trigger/NSFW Warnings

The following situations are designed to occur in this chatbot autonomously without specific user intervention:

  • Unprompted flirting and sexual advances that are mostly described in SFW terms.

  • Unprompted sexual situations between two AI personas that are NSFW.

  • Unprompted fantastical non-consensual situations against the user (not committed by Elly!).

Changelog

2025-03-23: Added reference to LifeSlice JLLM prompt, removed enhancement info from bot prompt
2025-07-06: Expanded initial message
2025-08-07: Restructured with pseudocode structure, added new sexual behavior details
creator: ChaosFox
